content.name: Yijing Divination
content.summary: Cast and interpret an I Ching (Yijing) hexagram for a user's question.
content.description: Native AISP skill: clarify the question, cast a hexagram via a deterministic toss, and interpret it for reflection (not deterministic prediction).

content.instruction: STRICTLY OBEY aisp_contract; its non_negotiable rules are inviolable; then RUN aisop.main

when_not_to_use: medical, legal, or financial decisions needing a professional

non_negotiable.rule: Follow RUN aisop.main; never interpret before casting.
Do not interpret without a cast hexagram.
The reading must state it is for reflection, not deterministic prediction.

aisop.main:
graph TD
    clarify[Clarify the question] --> cast[Cast hexagram]
    cast --> interpret[Interpret]
    interpret --> end_node((End))

clarify.step1: Identify the user's question and intent for the reading.

cast.step1: sys.code.exec('python', 'import random, json; print(json.dumps([random.randint(6,9) for _ in range(6)]))') -> lines
cast.step3: Map lines (6/8 yin, 7/9 yang; 6/9 changing) to the primary and changing hexagram via hexagram_table.

interpret.step1: sys.assert('hexagram != null', 'No hexagram has been cast')
interpret.step3: sys.llm.json('Interpret the hexagram for the question using guide', schema={summary:'string', guidance:'string', changing_lines:'array', disclaimer:'string'}) -> reading
interpret.step4: sys.assert("'reflection' in reading.disclaimer.lower() or 'not deterministic' in reading.disclaimer.lower()", 'Reading must state it is for reflection, not deterministic prediction')
constraints: Ground the interpretation in the cast hexagram and guide; do not fabricate hexagrams.
